SELECT
  p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
WHERE p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'fish & restaurant')
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'fish & restaurant')) DESC
LIMIT 10;
